rdataset 1.0.0
  • Reference

get_rabund

Source: R/RcppExports.R
get_rabund.Rd

Get data.frame containing bin abundance data in a dataset object

get_rabund(data, type = "otu")

Arguments

data,

a dataset object

type

a string indicating the type of bin assignments. Default "otu".

Value

a 2 column data.frame containing bin names and bin abundances

Examples


  data <- miseq_sop_example()
#> ℹ Added 2425 sequences.
#> ℹ Assigned 2425 sequence abundances.
#> ℹ Assigned 2425 sequence taxonomies.
#> ℹ Assigned 531 otu bins.
#> ℹ Assigned 2425 asv bins.
#> ℹ Assigned 63 phylotype bins.
#> ℹ Assigned 19 samples to treatments.
#> ℹ Assigned 531 otu bin taxonomies.
#> ℹ Added 2 resource references.
#> ℹ Assigned 531 otu bin representative sequences.
  get_rabund(data)
#>     otu_id abundance
#> 1   Otu001     12288
#> 2   Otu002      8892
#> 3   Otu003      7794
#> 4   Otu004      7476
#> 5   Otu005      7450
#> 6   Otu006      6621
#> 7   Otu007      6304
#> 8   Otu008      5337
#> 9   Otu009      3606
#> 10  Otu010      3061
#> 11  Otu011      2937
#> 12  Otu012      2074
#> 13  Otu013      1854
#> 14  Otu014      1452
#> 15  Otu015      1316
#> 16  Otu016      1291
#> 17  Otu017      1157
#> 18  Otu018      1131
#> 19  Otu019      1070
#> 20  Otu020       975
#> 21  Otu021       959
#> 22  Otu022       863
#> 23  Otu023       841
#> 24  Otu024       761
#> 25  Otu025       738
#> 26  Otu026       731
#> 27  Otu027       657
#> 28  Otu028       652
#> 29  Otu029       637
#> 30  Otu030       595
#> 31  Otu031       574
#> 32  Otu032       538
#> 33  Otu033       534
